response.justification: Bogdan is a highly accomplished Staff/Senior Software Engineer with 15+ years of experience across web, embedded, mobile, and distributed systems — far exceeding the junior/mid-level scope of this role. While he possesses the core technical skills (TypeScript, Node.js, REST APIs, React, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, LLM tooling), he is severely overqualified, which raises serious concerns about retention, salary alignment, and motivation fit for an entry-level IC position. His database experience skews toward MongoDB and lacks explicit PostgreSQL work, and NestJS is absent from his stack. There is no realistic scenario where this candidate thrives long-term in a role scoped below his current seniority.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise directly relevant to the stack (re:cinq, Optilyz)
Covers multiple nice-to-have qualifications including LLM/AI agent integration, AWS CDK, and Kubernetes
Berlin-based with a strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture)
concerns: Severely overqualified — currently Staff-level with 15+ years; this role targets entry-level contributors
No PostgreSQL experience listed; database background is primarily MongoDB and MySQL
NestJS is absent from the resume, and React appears only as a supporting tool rather than a primary focus
